name: fourstory

dependencies.name: openssl
dependencies.$comment: Used by Lib/Own/TNetLib/TNetLib/tnetlib_crypto.cpp for RC4+MD5 wire codec compatibility with legacy clients. Replaces vendored OpenSSL 0.9.8l (Nov 2009, EOL 2015) that lived at Lib/3rdParty/openssl/. RC4 requires the OpenSSL 3.x 'legacy' provider which the wrapper loads lazily via OSSL_PROVIDER_load.

dependencies.name: boost-asio
dependencies.$comment: Phase-1 Asio scaffolding (Lib/Own/TNetLib/TNetLib/asio_session.*). Used to write a portable async I/O layer that will eventually replace the Win32 IOCP loops in the legacy CSession class. Pulls in boost-system as transitive dep. Standalone (non-Boost) Asio is an alternative if we want fewer transitive deps later.

dependencies.name: spdlog
dependencies.$comment: Structured logging for TLoginSvrAsio + future modernized servers. Replaces the legacy LogEvent/printf/OutputDebugString mix. Default sink is stderr; production deployment can swap for a JSON sink or syslog.

dependencies.name: tomlplusplus
dependencies.$comment: TOML config file parser for TLoginSvrAsio. Replaces the legacy Win32-registry-based config. Type-safe, header-only, no dependencies beyond C++17.

dependencies.name: soci
dependencies.$comment: C++ DB access library for the modernized auth/char/map services. ODBC backend covers MSSQL (via msodbcsql driver — works on Linux + Windows). PostgreSQL feature was tried but vcpkg's libpq build on Windows fails on meson configure; drop it until we need PG cross-compat. The dialect branches in services/soci_*.cpp stay so adding the feature back is a one-liner here.

$comment-baseline: Pin a builtin-baseline (a microsoft/vcpkg commit SHA) when you want reproducible builds across machines. Until then, vcpkg will use whatever ports tree the user's vcpkg checkout has. Example: "builtin-baseline": "<sha>"
